name: netscoot
description: The netscoot plugin: AI-agent skills for restructuring .NET, PowerShell, Unity, and native C++ projects.

plugins.name: netscoot
plugins.description: Move and restructure .NET, PowerShell, Unity, and native C++ projects without breaking references. Solutions, project references, and hardcoded paths are reconciled through first-party tooling, with solution-consistency analysis and post-move verification.
